channel.title: Commentary on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Commentary on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: smart?
item.description: I heard a snippet on the radio where someone said they thought the new Twitter guy was smarter than Einstein. I assumed they meant Albert. However, the evidence would suggest otherwise….

item.title: free bird?
item.description: So, the bird is apparently free. Perhaps so, but instead of taking flight I expect an accelerated death spiral. Time to head for fresh pastures, I think. I’ll swap the bird for a different genus: Mastodon.
